## 📚 Documentation Issue

Which documentation needs improvement?

- [ ] README.md
- [ ] CONTRIBUTING.md
- [ ] API Documentation
- [ ] Code Comments
- [ ] Setup Instructions
- [ ] Architecture Documentation
- [ ] Other (please specify)

## 📄 Current Documentation

Describe what the current documentation says or what is missing.

## ✏️ Suggested Improvement

Describe what you'd like to see improved or added.

## 🎯 Why This Matters

Explain why this documentation improvement would be helpful.

## 📝 Proposed Changes

If you have specific text or examples to suggest, include them here.

```markdown
Your suggested documentation text here
```

## 🔗 Related Resources

Link to any external resources or references that might help.

## 📸 Screenshots

If applicable, add screenshots showing where the documentation is unclear.

## 📝 Additional Context

Add any other context about the documentation request here.
